title: Overview
description:
Overview

Overview

In this chapter we will focus on some concepts and definitions so you can gain a complete understanding of Vision Guide 8.0 and its components.  We will cover the following topics:

Basic
	 definitions which you should understand to use Vision Guide 8.0.

How
	 to open the Vision Guide 8.0 window.

An
	 explanation of the Vision Guide 8.0 video display.

An
	 introduction to all the vision objects and the buttons on the toolbar
	 to manipulate them.

An
	 introduction to properties and results.

An
	 explanation of the Sequence, Object, and Calibration windows

How
	 to execute a vision object or a vision sequence and an explanation
	 about when to use each.
